text:
from Mars is Venus. and
Venus is in conjunction with Mercury. So, when these two are together,
the native should obtain at least one wife. In addition to this, Jupiter
aspects both Venus and Mercury. At least, this should enable the native to
get a wife. 1s it not so?
Preceptor: 1n this horoscope, Mercury and Venus are in the
second house from Mars, which means that the lord of the seventh
house Venus is in conjunction with Mercury the lord of the 8th and 11th
house from Mars. This indicates that a woman (indicated by Mercury)
will formally marry him, but will desert the native and live with a former
sweetheart of hers. This is indicated by the exchange of houses between
Jupiter and Mercury.
There is the Sun in the second house from Mars. This indicates
that the wife who deserted the native will arrange matters in such a way
that the native will not get any trouble from the Government. One year
after this, the native will marry again. The first marriage will take place
